# Sub PEQ filters
# miniDSP-style peaking filters plus normalized biquad coefficients
# Biquad convention: y[n] = b0*x[n] + b1*x[n-1] + b2*x[n-2] - a1*y[n-1] - a2*y[n-2]

Filter 1: ON PK Fc 57.495 Hz Gain -8.507 dB Q 3.3382
  biquad b0=0.999426195094 b1=-1.99814808102 b2=0.998736033411 a1=-1.99814808102 a2=0.998162228506
Filter 2: ON PK Fc 106.934 Hz Gain +3.000 dB Q 1.8166
  biquad b0=1.0006675539 b1=-1.99671476605 b2=0.996096115717 a1=-1.99671476605 a2=0.996763669613

  biquad b0=0.999636004815 b1=-1.9980178541 b2=0.998385898849 a1=-1.9980178541 a2=0.998021903664

  biquad b0=1.0001488291 b1=-1.99901345223 b2=0.998874178476 a1=-1.99901345223 a2=0.999023007576
